'''yachosho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:foetometry|foetometry]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-ch-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:foetometry|foetometry]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| yachosho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:yæchesheth|yæchesheth]] || [[word:yæcheshej|yæcheshej]] || [[word:yæcheshesh|yæcheshesh]] || [[word:yæcheshe|yæcheshe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:yachochoshoth|yachochoshoth]] || [[word:yachochoshoj|yachochoshoj]] || [[word:yachochoshosh|yachochoshosh]] || [[word:yachochosho|yachochosho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:yachoshoth|yachoshoth]] || [[word:yachoshoj|yachoshoj]] || [[word:yachoshosh|yachoshosh]] || [[word:yachosho|yachosho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:yachofshoth|yachofshoth]] || [[word:yachofshoj|yachofshoj]] || [[word:yachofshosh|yachofshosh]] || [[word:yachofshof|yachofshof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yachoshotho|yachoshotho]] || [[word:yachoshojo|yachoshojo]] || [[word:yachoshosho|yachoshosho]] || [[word:yachoshoko|yachoshoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yachoshoth|yachoshoth]] || [[word:yachoshoj|yachoshoj]] || [[word:yachoshosh|yachoshosh]] || [[word:yachosho|yachosho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yachoshothol|yachoshothol]] || [[word:yachoshojol|yachoshojol]] || [[word:yachoshoshol|yachoshoshol]] || [[word:yachoshokol|yachoshokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yachoshothotho|yachoshothotho]] || [[word:yachoshojojo|yachoshojojo]] || [[word:yachoshoshosho|yachoshoshosho]] || [[word:yachoshoko|yachoshoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yachoshothon|yachoshothon]] || [[word:yachoshojon|yachoshojon]] || [[word:yachoshoshon|yachoshoshon]] || [[word:yachoshokon|yachoshokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yachoshothoro|yachoshothoro]] || [[word:yachoshojoro|yachoshojoro]] || [[word:yachoshoshoro|yachoshoshoro]] || [[word:yachoshokoro|yachoshokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|27df60f}}
